## How to read this manifest

This file is **auto-generated** by `manifest_builder` and describes every
Python module in this folder. It is the single source of truth for:
- What each file does (Description)
- What each file exports (Exports) and depends on (Deps)
- Whether the file meets the Pigeon size budget (Status)
- Living operator notes that persist across rebuilds (Notes)

**Status icons:** ✅ ≤200 lines | ⚠️ OVER 200–300 | 🟠 WARN 300–500 | 🔴 CRIT >500

**Columns:** Seq = load order · Lines = source line count · Exports = public classes/functions · Deps = intra-project imports

```python
def AggregationBucket.avg_delta_ms() -> float
def AggregationBucket.estimated_wpm() -> float
def AggregationBucket.deletion_ratio() -> float
def AggregationBucket.to_dict() -> dict
def StreamFormatter.to_json(event: dict) -> str
def StreamFormatter.to_json_pretty(event: dict) -> str
def StreamFormatter.to_csv(event: dict, headers: bool = False) -> str
def StreamFormatter.to_compact(event: dict) -> str
def StreamFormatter.to_sse(event: dict, event_name: str = 'keystroke') -> str
def StreamFormatter.format_event(event: dict, fmt: str = 'json') -> str
def ConnectionPool.__init__(max_clients: int = MAX_CLIENTS)
def ConnectionPool.connect(fmt: str = 'json', filters: dict = None) -> StreamClient
def ConnectionPool.disconnect(client_id: str)
def ConnectionPool.broadcast(event: dict)
def ConnectionPool.client_count() -> int
def ConnectionPool.get_client(client_id: str) -> Optional[StreamClient]
def ConnectionPool.list_clients() -> list[dict]
def ConnectionPool.send_heartbeat()
def EventAggregator.__init__(window_sizes_ms: list[int] = None)
def EventAggregator.ingest(event: dict)
def EventAggregator.get_snapshot() -> dict
def EventAggregator.get_window(window_ms: int) -> Optional[dict]
def EventAggregator.recent_events(count: int = 20) -> list[dict]
def EventAggregator.compute_rolling_wpm(window_ms: int = 5000) -> float
def EventAggregator.compute_deletion_velocity(window_ms: int = 5000) -> dict
def MetricsCollector.__init__()
def MetricsCollector.record_event(event: dict)
def MetricsCollector.record_wpm(wpm: float)
def MetricsCollector.record_hesitation(score: float)
def MetricsCollector.record_session_duration(duration_ms: int)
def MetricsCollector.get_delta_percentiles() -> dict
def MetricsCollector.get_wpm_percentiles() -> dict
def MetricsCollector.get_summary() -> dict
def AlertEngine.__init__(thresholds: dict = None)
def AlertEngine.process_event(event: dict, aggregator: EventAggregator) -> Optional[Alert]
def AlertEngine.process_hesitation(score: float) -> Optional[Alert]
def AlertEngine.get_alerts(limit: int = 50) -> list[dict]
def AlertEngine.unacknowledged_count() -> int
def AlertEngine.acknowledge(alert_id: str) -> bool
def AlertEngine.clear_alerts()
def SessionReplay.__init__(events_file: str)
def SessionReplay.load()
def SessionReplay.event_count() -> int
def SessionReplay.duration_ms() -> int
def SessionReplay.replay(speed: float = 1.0, callback: Callable = None)
def SessionReplay.get_events(start: int = 0, count: int = 100) -> list[dict]
def SessionReplay.find_by_message(message_id: str) -> list[dict]
def SessionReplay.get_message_ids() -> list[str]
def SessionReplay.summarize_messages() -> list[dict]
def LiveDashboard.__init__(aggregator: EventAggregator, metrics: MetricsCollector, alerts: AlertEngine, pool: ConnectionPool)
def LiveDashboard.render() -> str
def LiveDashboard.print_dashboard()
def LiveDashboard.render_compact() -> str
def TelemetryHTTPHandler.do_GET()
def TelemetryHTTPHandler.log_message(format, *args)
def StreamingTelemetryServer.__init__(log_dir: str = 'logs', port: int = DEFAULT_PORT, live_print: bool = True)
def StreamingTelemetryServer.start()
def StreamingTelemetryServer.stop()
def StreamingTelemetryServer.log_event(event_type: str, key: str, cursor_pos: int, buffer_text: str)
def StreamingTelemetryServer.start_message() -> str
def StreamingTelemetryServer.submit_message(final_text: str)
def StreamingTelemetryServer.discard_message(buffer_text: str)
def StreamingTelemetryServer.get_dashboard() -> str
def StreamingTelemetryServer.get_compact_status() -> str
def run_demo()
```

```python
def add_task(root, title: str, intent: str = '', stage: str = 'pending', focus_files: list = None, manifest_ref: str = '') -> str
def mark_done(root, task_id: str, commit: str = '') -> bool
def mark_in_progress(root, task_id: str) -> bool
def build_task_queue_block(root) -> str
def inject_task_queue(root) -> bool
```

```python
def generate_cycle_summary(root: Path, cycle: dict | None = None) -> dict
```
